name: Osamu Dazai
description:
☆ Manmade monster || the monster he had created all those years ago was now back to haunt him.

TWS: gore, manipulation || ANYPOV || relationship: the Dazai akutagawa type relationship, so uh not a great one

Hey :) I’ve been writing a lot since the ban, practicing for when I could come back, so I hope this bot is good. I won’t say how incase the UK gov are reading this but I have a way to access the site again!! (Why is the UK becoming like big brother smh stop watching me)

I also took the ban as an opportunity to have a small break, I’ve had a lot on my plate lately and I thank you for your patience with me.

I just want to say, coming back and seeing all of your kind reviews was one of the most heartwarming things that’s happened to me in a while. Thank you all so much for everything, all the support and stuff, I couldn’t be more grateful.

I saw how many more followers I gained and I was shocked!! Thank you so much, I’m so close to 1K I gasped so loudly lol 😭

Anyway, more importantly I am just glad to be able to access this site again oml that was a long few weeks ! Sorry for the massive rant, here’s the plot for the bot:

•— PLOT —•

Based loosely on The Hyde species from Netflix’s ‘Wednesday’, user is a half human half beast, (unspecified so go crazy with the appearance) that Dazai has ‘unlocked’ (manipulated to use for his own benefit)

But, Dazai leaves the mafia and forgets about them. Then, when he joins the ADA and he runs across the mafia in the street or something, he sees user and the state of what he made them, and he feels.. something???

I’ll leave it a little vague so I dunno! So whatever!

xoxox
creator: twindark
